stemHtml: According to the Threat and Error Management (TEM) model, What is the correct definition of "undesired aircraft state"?

options.a: It is an event or error that occurs beyond the influence of the flight crew, increases operational complexity and must be managed to maintain an acceptable margin of safety.
options.b: Actions or inactions by the flight crew that lead to deviations from organisational or flight crew intentions or expectations.
options.c: It is an undesired flight situation associated with a reduction in margins of safety.
options.d: Accidents that are the result of undesired actions or inactions by the flight crew.
